constraints: Evidence acceptance may accept reviewed refs only.
Evidence acceptance may not grant runtime authority.
Runtime admission gate must consume accepted evidence and remain blocked under Foundation Mode.

Runtime enablement, dispatch, worker invocation, receipt emission, receipt append, terminal closure, connector authority, filesystem writes, network access, secret serialization, and success claims remain denied.
non_goals: Do not grant runtime enablement authority.
Do not dispatch or invoke a worker.
Do not emit or append runtime receipts.
Do not serialize raw secret values.
problem_statement: Runtime enablement review had reviewed and submitted evidence refs, but needed explicit acceptance and admission gates to prevent evidence acceptance from being confused with runtime execution authority.
success_criteria: Evidence acceptance gate validates with twelve accepted refs and zero authority grants.
Runtime admission gate validates with evidence accepted and runtime admission denied.
Focused validators, focused pytest, protocol manifest validation, SDLC artifact validation, schema validation, and whitespace checks pass.
